title: Parallel model installs (no shared-dep collision)
description: User request 2026-06-15 (found while testing MPI-81 restart on a remote Pod): the user must be able to queue SEVERAL models to install at once with no conflicts. Today a second install whose dep is already downloading is REJECTED whole ('this model is already downloading' → a scary Download-Failed+GitHub dialog) instead of sharing/awaiting the in-flight dep. Root: the per-dep download guard is coarse + not refcounted across concurrent model jobs. Fix (app-side, remote + local; NO image rebuild): refcount each dep across model jobs so a model needing an already-downloading dep ATTACHES to the running download (completes when it lands) rather than failing; let independent deps download concurrently; downgrade the collision message to a non-error toast (or silent). Pairs with MPI-81 #9 (orphan .part on abort) + the SSE-recover gap (install event stream can drop mid-install and hang the card). See brief.md.
activeSessionTitle: Parallel install shared-dep refcount (remote attach + SSE recover)
